description_long: This is a freestanding, four-shelf wooden cabinet with a rectangular profile and a slightly irregular, hand-crafted appearance. The cabinet features open shelving on the front, with one lower drawer partially pulled out and a side compartment or box attached to the right. The surfaces are matte and show subtle wood grain patterns, with some warping and unevenness that give it a rustic, utilitarian look. The back and sides are solid panels, while the front is fully open for easy access to the shelves and drawer. There are no visible handles or glass panels, and the construction appears to be entirely of wood or a wood-like material. The overall color is a uniform light brown, resembling unfinished or lightly stained wood.
description: A rustic, light brown wooden cabinet with four open shelves, a lower drawer, and a side compartment, featuring a matte, hand-crafted finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid panel and the protruding side compartment.
description_view_1: Front view displaying four open shelves and a partially open lower drawer, with the side compartment visible on the right.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a solid panel and the side compartment extending outward.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the open shelves and the attached side compartment, with no visible drawer opening.
